name: AI email analyzer with PDF processing and Google Sheets logging
description: Lists recent Gmail messages, uses Claude AI to analyze email content and extract key data, saves structured summaries to Google Sheets, and posts a consolidated report to Slack.

source.originalName: AI email analyzer: Process PDFs, images & save to Google Drive + Telegram

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving summaries

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for report delivery

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for the email analysis report

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of recent emails to analyze

spreadsheetName.description: Name for the Google Sheets spreadsheet

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for email analysis
Build spreadsheet rows from email analysis
Save email analysis to Google Sheets
Post email analysis report to Slack
